utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: All right ladies , here is what we are gonna do .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I ... I wanna be with her , I like her .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , that is fine ! Go with your instincts , go with your instincts .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Wait , now , what am I doing again ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Come on ! Would you please pay attention , I could wake up at any moment !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Would you please pay attention , I could wake up at any moment !

utterances.speaker: The Cigarette Guy
utterances.text: Hi , I am Joshua , I am here to pick up Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ... no ... no , that not Joshua .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What do you want from me , I have never met the guy .

emotion_cause.span: 8_What do you want from me , I have never met the guy .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So anyway , Rachel , I am sorry you can not stay , but the rest of us have a lot of work to do .

emotion_cause.span: 9_you can not stay , but the rest of us have a lot of work to do .
